texto: Family… that was my older sister Tiffany as well. My emotional spectrum for her covered everything from “my dearest sister, foundation of my heart and soul” up to “you fucking bitch, go and get run over by a train, please”. We had quite a normal sibling relationship, I assume.
explicacao: Citação de Hasimir Fenrig sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Family… that was my older sister Tiffany as well. My emotional spectrum for her covered everythin…” articula reflexao, family-relationships, sister em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e reflexao.
